did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper did not use AI to obtain its results. It is a reader study that collected diagnostic performance data (sensitivity, specificity, ROC) from 157 dermatologists via an electronic questionnaire. The paper's purpose is to establish a public benchmark (MClass) for future AI comparison, not to present new AI results.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
